fields.label: Access Token
fields.helpText: Generate at canva.com/developers → Your Apps → Generate Token

healthcheck_config.description: Validates access token via Canva /users/me endpoint

metadata.summary: Canva design platform for creating, managing, and exporting designs via the Canva Connect API.
metadata.setup_guide:
1. Go to canva.com/developers and sign in.
2. Create a new integration or select an existing one.
3. Generate an access token with the required scopes.
4. Copy the token and paste it here.
